channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: Unpacking Iran’s Drone Campaign in the Gulf: Early Lessons for Future Drone Warfare
item.description: Kateryna Bondar analyzes Iran’s drone retaliation campaign during Operation Epic Fury, showing how mass one-way attack drones are reshaping air warfare and what lessons the United States can draw from both the Gulf conflict and Ukraine’s experience.
